steps.title: Add a second harm
steps.content: The paragraph argues that wishcycling harms recycling. After contamination of recyclable batches, the next sentence adds another harm: damage to recycling plant machinery.

steps.title: Reject contrast transitions
steps.content: A signals aptness rather than addition, B signals reversal, and D signals concession. The sentence needs an additive transition for another supporting point. The answer is C.
